docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TALMADGE, JOE DBA WORLD GYM SAN FRANCISCO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUBIN, LIOR DBA INTEGRA SYSTEMS AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE, JOE DBA WORLD GYM SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-27-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT JOE TALMADGE APPEARS AT 8;45 AM AND MAKES AN ORAL REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE HEARING DUE TO A FAMILY EMRGENCY WITH HIS SON. HE HAS A FLIGHT TODAY AT 11;00 AM. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF GRANTS THE REQUEST. THE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED PRESENT FOR THE NEXT HEARING. PLAINTIFF LIOR RUBIN IS INFORMED OF THE CONTINUANCE DATE BY PHONE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED DEC-03-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE, JOE DBA WORLD GYM SAN FRANCISCO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,429.56 FILED BY RUBIN, LIOR DBA INTEGRA SYSTEMS AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE, JOE DBA WORLD GYM SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-14-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIF ARRIVED IN THE COURTROOM AT 10:45AM BY THEN THE DEFENDANT ALREADY LEFT THE COURTROOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-13-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT SENT HIS REPRESENTATIVE ARLENE ROBIN VOLLAND--DIRECTOR OF BUSINESS TO ASK FOR A CONTINUANCE AS THERE WAS DEATH IN THE FAMILY AND HE IS OUT OF STATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
